method: west-first source-preserving pass: keep whole donors, then map unique patterns without dismantling Synthia

placement.message-hub.js: EventBus, Message Possum, MCP envelope routing, AI/provider message passing. MCP lives here as protocol/channel, not detached tool list.
placement.app-center-registry.js: Visible registry face: apps, files, agents, MCP tools, ingested organs, installed app list, source inventory launchers.
placement.source-file-registry.js: Canonical source inventory and donor ancestry. Keeps every source file addressable and restorable.
placement.agent-registry.js: Agent identity/profile/skills registry and AI participant records.
placement.mcp-morph-bridge.js: MCP discovery/call/execute translated into morph message envelopes and routed through message hub.
placement.svg-studio.js: SVG maker and vector/shape editing organ.
placement.mesh-matrix.js: Persistent 5-layer/5D mesh, node relation field, MRNN/crossmodal matrix.
placement.substrate-bridge.js: Bridge to sealed Synthia substrate. Synthia source is preserved untouched and mounted, not picked apart.
placement.ingestion-runtime.js: File/text/zip ingestion, atomization, ancestry registration, donor digestion pipeline.
placement.external-ai-bridges.js: HuggingFace, Expo/mobile, backend/trident URLs, voice/audio, external AI connectors.
placement.morphic-overlay.js: PhonyOS/morph lens, device modes, reality strip, atmosphere color/pulse.
placement.keyboard-ime-sidecar: MorphKeyboard Android IME sidecar source preserved separately.
